title: Vor-cal
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|Cal}}
[[File:Vor-cal.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Vor-cal Festivities]]
The '''Vor-cal''' was an annual safari hunt attended by each house of the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]] as well as other prominent institutions. Each year a different house sponsored the Vor-cal and hosted the pre-hunt festivities on board their orbital hunting lodge. A popular place to hold the Vor-cal was on [[Vycinyth]]'s moon of [[Vilhon]]. The night before the Vor-cal, the grand [[Vor-cal Feast]] was held by the hosting house, whose representative opened with a speech that introduced the participants and announced the target prey for that year.

When House Melantha hosted the event prior to the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], the target prey was the [[Rodian Karstag]]. On this occasion the hunt was staged at the [[House Melantha Orbital Hunting Lodge]].

Following the [[Mecetti Purge]] [[House Pelagia]] boycotted the Vor-cal each year [[House Melantha]] or [[House Mecetti]] sponsored the event.

==Notable participants==
*Lord [[Vaskel Savill]], representing [[House Melantha]]
*Lord [[Alric Adannon]], representing [[House Cadriaan]]
*Lord [[Corell Muntique]], representing [[House Calipsa]]
*Lady [[Damara Decrilla]], representing [[House Mecetti]]
*Baron [[Quinn Sheffield]], representing [[House Reena/Legends|House Reena]]
*[[Casimir Everard]], representing [[House Barnaba]]
*[[Kyla Latrel]], representing [[Tampson Consolidated, Incorporated]]
*[[Annora Calandra]], representing the [[Mining Guild/Legends|Mining Guild]]
*Dr. [[Arkeld]], representing [[Mrlsst Trade and Science Academy]]
